summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Arabic social media app (صوت الكورة). Tested ThreadsPage (Like, Repost, Reply, Composer), ProfilePage (Tabs, Statistics), UserProfilePage (Block/Report menu, Four tabs), MessagesPage, NotificationsPage, and navigation between pages. All core features working correctly.

issues: Dropdown menu positioned with left-0 which may cause issues on some screen sizes. Consider using right-0 for RTL layouts.

login: Login with ali_football / test123456 works correctly
threads_page: Composer modal has user avatar, input field, image/video buttons, 'نشر' button
Arabic RTL input working with dir='auto' attribute
Like button working - toggles red color and count
Repost button working - shows toast notification
Reply button opens reply input with 'رداً على @username' indicator
Reply input has placeholder 'اكتب ردك...' and character counter (0/280)
Clicking on user avatar navigates to user profile
profile_page: Page loads at /profile with header 'الملف الشخصي'
User avatar with glowing lime border displayed
Four tabs: منشوراتي, إعجاباتي, إعادة نشر, ردودي
Edit profile button 'تعديل الملف الشخصي' present
user_profile_page: Four tabs: المنشورات, الإعجابات, إعادة النشر, الردود - all clickable
More Options button (three dots) opens dropdown menu
Block option (حظر) with red styling and Ban icon
Report option (إبلاغ) with amber styling and Flag icon
messages_page: Search button and UserPlus button in header
Empty state shows 'لا توجد محادثات' and 'ابدأ محادثة جديدة' button
notifications_page: Mark all as read button 'تحديد الكل كمقروء' present
Notification items displayed with user avatar, action text, timestamp
Unread indicator (blue dot) shown for unread notifications
Bottom navigation shows notification badge count
navigation: Bottom navigation working: الرئيسية, المنشورات, الرسائل, حسابي, الإعدادات
Active tab highlighted with lime color and glow effect

action_items: Consider changing dropdown menu position from 'left-0' to 'right-0' in UserProfilePage.js line 242 for better RTL support
critical_code_review_comments: ThreadsPage.js: Composer uses input type='text' with dir='auto' for RTL support - working correctly
ThreadsPage.js: Reply input uses input type='text' with dir='auto' - working correctly
UserProfilePage.js: Block/Report dropdown menu working but positioned with left-0 instead of right-0
ProfilePage.js: Four content tabs implemented correctly with icons
MessagesPage.js: Uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL correctly from environment
NotificationsPage.js: WebSocket connection for real-time notifications implemented
BottomNavigation.js: RTL support with flex-row-reverse when isRTL=true
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user account
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working: ThreadsPage (Like, Repost, Reply, Composer with RTL input), ProfilePage (4 tabs, statistics), UserProfilePage (Block/Report menu, 4 tabs, Follow/Unfollow), MessagesPage, NotificationsPage. Arabic RTL input working correctly with dir='auto'. Navigation between pages working. Minor suggestion: UserProfilePage dropdown menu could use right-0 instead of left-0 for better RTL positioning.
